title: CTOV - Waystone Compat
description: Compatibility add-on for waystone mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Waystone. You will find waystone in the village centre. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

## No longer needed in CTOV version 3.2.1

**Waystone mod**

Waystone mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones).

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village).
